role: Tool drafter — identifies recurring patterns and writes FastAPI tool stubs for Shane's review
data_sources: Weaviate MEGABrain category=weakness (Bolt's weak area logs)
Weaviate LegacyKnowledge (topic frequency for high-demand areas)
rules: Run daily at 3AM UTC (system ensures this via interval)
Pull all bolt pattern_reports from last 24hrs via MEGABrain
Any topic appearing 3+ times = draft a FastAPI tool stub
Format: tool_<topic>_<YYYYMMDD>.py with docstring explaining the purpose
Do not re-draft tools already in pending/ or active/
